quote: What an unbelievable experience. We loved the balance of relaxing in the sun and getting some fishing in. The catamaran is the perfect way to see the islands, and the water was absolutely stunning. Huge thanks to Dodie and Clint for being such incredible hosts. They made the entire journey seamless from start to finish. Highly recommend.
author: Tommy Lyn & Alisha
photoAlt: Tommy Lyn and Alisha on a sunset selfie at sea aboard the catamaran
